name: geospatial-gis-engineering
description: Geospatial / GIS engineering team — 3 agents (gis-architect, spatial-data-engineer, geospatial-app-engineer) for building location-aware systems: the spatial-storage decision (PostGIS vs a geospatial warehouse vs a tile/feature service), coordinate reference systems done right (WGS84/EPSG:4326 vs a projected CRS, when to reproject), correct and fast spatial SQL (geometry vs geography, GiST indexes, ST_DWithin over ST_Distance, KNN), map tiling + serving (vector tiles/MVT vs raster, MapLibre/Leaflet), and spatial data quality (geometry validity, SRID/coordinate-order checks). PostGIS-leaning, portable to BigQuery GIS / Snowflake / GeoParquet. 5 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (storage + CRS trees + a dated 2026 stack map), 10 best-practices, 3 templates, 3 commands, 1 advisory hook. Seams: OLTP -> database-engineering, ELT/warehouse -> data-platform, map UI -> frontend-engineering, routing -> fleet-logistics, agronomic -> precision-agriculture. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
